scripts.cap:copy: npm run cap:prepare && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:sync: npm run cap:prepare && npx cap sync android
scripts.android: npm run cap:sync && npm run cap:android-config && npm run cap:open
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run cap:sync && npm run cap:android-config && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location android; .\\gradlew.bat assembleDebug"
scripts.android:build:release: npm run cap:sync && npm run cap:android-config && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location android; .\\gradlew.bat bundleRelease"
scripts.android:setup: npm run cap:sync && npm run cap:android-config
scripts.gm:server: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location server; npm run start:dev"
